children.text: numeric shapes that resemble syntax in other languages must remain prose.
Notably "1970. It was" looks ordered-list-ish; "5*6*7" looks bold-ish; "3.14" is a literal.

children.value: It was 1970. It was the year the keeper bought his lamp, paid 5*6*7 shillings for the wick, and read the same 3.14-page pamphlet every evening until winter.
